chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-2794 of 2023 (M/s. Mafhh Enterprises Vs. K.D.A. & others) Dated Order with signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 13711/2023 2. For hearing of Main Case Dated 09.09.2024 Mr. Wahaj Ali Advocate holds brief for Mr. Shahab Sarki Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zia-ul-Haq Makhdoom Advocate for the Respondent No.1.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the petition has served its purpose, he has further been instructed not to press this petition. Dismissed as not pressed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Amjad PS
